diagrams.title: I/O Interface Block Diagram
diagrams.description: A block diagram showing the components of an I/O interface, including the CPU, external devices, and I/O controllers.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the components of an I/O interface and their relationships.

diagrams.title: I/O Buffering Diagram
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the process of I/O buffering, including the temporary storage of data during transfer.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of I/O buffering and its role in preventing data loss.

diagrams.title: I/O Caching Diagram
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the concept of I/O caching, including the storage of frequently accessed data in a faster, more accessible location.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of I/O caching and its benefits in improving system performance.
